title: selaginella viridula
intro: Selaginella viridula, also known as the green spike moss, is a species of evergreen, mat-forming or compact, terrestrial fern-like plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Selaginella viridula include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Selaginella viridula is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
